name: uacos-self-benchmark-suite
description: Repeatable dry benchmark suite for UACOS token/context efficiency and context quality signals. This does not require cloud LLMs.

tasks: validate MCP orchestration loop tool responses

quality_checks.task: validate MCP orchestration loop tool responses

method_notes: Token values are estimates from UACOS local token estimator, not provider billing records.
The baseline is estimated from full raw impacted files selected by UACOS impact/compression, so it is conservative and repeatable.
A positive savings score alone does not prove task success; quality checks are tracked separately.
No 80-90% claim should be made unless this suite and real-repo benchmarks support it.
